description.unified: Attacks all frontal enemies in a straight line, dealing P.DMG and stunning them for [1 sec->3 sec]. If the target is not a Hero, deals ??? additional P.DMG. [Experiment Success!] Removes Cooldown

Deals P.DMG to target and nearby enemies within range and inflict them with [Explosive Meterial] for [7 sec->10 sec], causing them to take 20% increased P.DMG and additional inflicting Blind for [1 sec->4 sec]. [Experiment Success!] Dispels positive effects from enemies within range.

Attaches a Glue Bomb to a random enemy that explodes in 3 sec, dealing P.DMG to the target and nearby enemies, inflicting Stun for [1 sec->3 sec]. If the target is inflicted with [Explosive Material], deals ??? additional P.DMG. [Experiment Success!] Glue Bomb explodes immediately after attachment.

Each auto attack has a 15% chance of firing a bomb that deals P.DMG and stuns them for [1 sec->2 sec]. After each Skill use, Lakrak conducts an experiment. The experiment has a 50% success rate. Upon success, enhances the effects of the next Skill use. Experiment does not occur when Lakrak uses the enhanced Skill.

dark.unified: Blind duration is increased by [1 sec->2 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [2000->1], and attacks a random target 2 times.
Activation chance is boosted by [25%->10%] and stun duration increases by [0.5 sec->1 sec].

description.unified: [Rapid Fire] Increases DMG by 50% and restores {0} mana on critical hit
[Smoke Bomb] Reduces Cooldown by 30% and increases blind duration by {0} sec.
[Glue Bomb] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces Heal Rate of the hit target by {0}% for 7 sec.

dark.unified: Each time Lakrak succeed an Experiment, his [Attack Speed by 12% and Status Ailment Accuracy by 150->attack rate increase by 300] for 10 sec.

description.unified: Lakrak's chances of successful Experiment are increased by {0}%, and each successful experiment increases his ATK by {1}%, ATK Spd by {2} and damage against none-Heroes by {3}%. This effect can stack up to [3->4] times and is irremovable.

Summons the soul of Lakrak MK-1, [(added) increasing own ATK by 50%] for 12 sec. Afterward, deals a total of ??? P.DMG to enemies within range of a random enemy over 5 times every 4 sec, stunning them for 2 sec and increasing P.DMG they take by 30% for 8 sec.

1.from: Becomes immune to CC for 6 sec.
1.to: Reduces Skill Activation requirements by 2 sec and gains immunity to CC for 12 sec.
1.unified: [(added) Reduces Skill Activation requirements by 2 sec and] gains immunity to CC for [6 sec->12 sec].

2.from: Every 4 sec, reduces cooldown of all skills by 2 sec.
2.to: Reduces Skill Activation requirements by an additional 4 sec, and immediately reduces Cooldown of all Skills by 3 sec every 4 sec.
2.unified: [(added) Reduces Skill Activation requirements by an additional 4 sec, and immediately] reduces Cooldown of all Skills by [2 sec->3 sec] every 4 sec.
